properties.description: Thesis: Fully Distributed IoT Layer utilizing Ethereum Blockchain and IPFS, featuring Solidity Smart Contracts integrated with IPFS, enabling secure device interaction, data notarization, and firmware certification, substantiated by a Case Study and Formal Analysis.

Thesis: Developed Blockchain analysis tools to detect user behavioral patterns in Bitcoin, enabling identification of addresses associated with malicious activities through pattern-focused analysis. Obtained Microsoft Azure research grant and AWS research grant.

properties.title: Senior Blockchain Engineer
properties.description: Primarily focused on the development of the kakarot RPC. Gas fee rebalancing, enhanced Kakarot Indexer by optimizing transaction indexing and mapping of Ethereum transactions to Starknet transactions.

properties.title: Senior Blockchain Engineer
properties.description: Developed Polygon Nightfall core. Built Regulator service with 3-way Diffie-Hellman encryption, integrated atomic transactions, developed transformTransfer operation for L2 token transformation.

properties.title: Blockchain Engineer
properties.description: Developed Polygon Nightfall core. Enhanced wallet block communication scalability by transitioning from WebSocket to hybrid system. Developed Nightfall's POS mechanism with multiple-proposer system.

properties.title: Smart Contract Engineer
properties.description: Developed a protocol that allows arbitrage between various DEX on the Ethereum blockchain, involving complex swaps to achieve profitable arbitrage.

properties.title: Co-founder & CTO
properties.description: Blockchain-based startup combating ticket scalping on live events, reached 65K users and organized 1K events. Managed technical team, developed ERC721/ERC1155/ERC20 tokens, smart contracts, serverless APIs, and web interface.

properties.title: Co-Founder
properties.description: Non-profit community of 2K members preparing individuals for FAANG interviews through talks, mock interviews, coding challenges, and mentorship program.
